transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: 你好，我想要一杯拿铁咖啡。

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: 好的，您要大杯还是小杯？

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: 大杯，谢谢。还有，能加一份燕麦奶吗？

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: 当然可以。请问您的名字是？

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: 我叫小明。

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: 好的，小明，请稍等。

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: Hello, I'd like a latte, please.

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Sure, would you like a large or small?

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: Large, thank you. Also, can you add oat milk?

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Of course. May I have your name?

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: My name is Xiao Ming.

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Alright, Xiao Ming, please wait a moment.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: 师傅，请到北京路地铁站。

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: 好的，现在很堵，可能要二十分钟。

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: 没关系，我不着急。请走高速吧。

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: 好，走高速要加十块钱过路费。

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: 没问题，我用微信支付可以吗？

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: Driver, please take me to Beijing Road subway station.

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Alright, traffic is heavy — it might take around twenty minutes.

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: That's fine, I'm not in a hurry. Please take the expressway.

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Okay, taking the expressway will add ten yuan in toll fees.

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: No problem. Can I pay with WeChat Pay?

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: صباح الخير، أريد حجز موعد مع الدكتور.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: صباح النور، ما اسمك من فضلك؟

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: اسمي أحمد حسن، ولدي ألم في الظهر.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: حسناً، يوجد موعد الثلاثاء الساعة الثالثة.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: ممتاز، سأكون هناك. شكراً جزيلاً.

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: Good morning, I'd like to book an appointment with the doctor.

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Good morning, what is your name, please?

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: My name is Ahmed Hassan, and I have back pain.

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Alright, there is an appointment on Tuesday at three o'clock.

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: Excellent, I'll be there. Thank you very much.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: بكم هذه التمور؟

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: خمسة وعشرون ريالاً للكيلو.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: غالي شوي، ممكن تخفض؟

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: طيب، عشرون ريالاً لأنك زبون قديم.

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: How much are these dates?

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Twenty-five riyals per kilogram.

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: A bit expensive, can you lower it?

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Alright, twenty riyals since you're a regular customer.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: नमस्ते, मुझे दिल्ली से मुंबई की ट्रेन टिकट चाहिए।

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: कौन सी तारीख को जाना है आपको?

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: पंद्रह मार्च को, और वापसी अठारह को।

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: ठीक है, राजधानी एक्सप्रेस में सीट उपलब्ध है।

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: बढ़िया, AC थर्ड क्लास में बुक कर दीजिए।

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: Hello, I need a train ticket from Delhi to Mumbai.

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Which date are you looking to travel?

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: March fifteenth, and returning on the eighteenth.

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Alright, seats are available on the Rajdhani Express.

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: Great, please book it in AC Third Class.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: हेलो, मेरा नेट पैक चार्ज हो गया लेकिन डेटा नहीं मिला।

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: [inaudible] कृपया अपना नंबर बताइए।

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: नंबर है नौ-आठ-सात-छह-पाँच-चार-तीन-दो-एक।

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: धन्यवाद, हम चौबीस घंटे में समस्या हल करेंगे।

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: Hello, my data pack was charged but I didn't receive any data.

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: [inaudible] Please tell me your number.

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: The number is nine-eight-seven-six-five-four-three-two-one.

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Thank you, we will resolve the issue within twenty-four hours.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: 안녕하세요, 오늘 저녁 예약 가능한가요?

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: 네, 몇 분이서 오시나요?

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: 4명이요. 7시에 창가 자리로 부탁드려요.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: 죄송하지만 창가 자리는 이미 예약이 꽉 찼어요.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: 그럼 안쪽 자리도 괜찮아요. 이름은 김지수예요.

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: Hello, is a reservation available for this evening?

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Yes, how many people will be dining?

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: Four people. Please book a window seat at seven o'clock.

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: I'm sorry, but window seats are fully booked.

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: Then an interior seat is fine. The name is Kim Ji-su.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: 주문한 상품이 아직도 안 왔어요. 언제 오나요?

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: 주문번호를 알려주시겠어요?

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: 확인해보니 내일 오후에 배송될 예정이에요.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: 감사합니다.

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: My order still hasn't arrived. When is it coming?

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Could you give me your order number?

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: I checked and it's scheduled to be delivered tomorrow afternoon.

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: Thank you.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: Bonjour, j'ai une réservation au nom de Dupont.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: Bonjour monsieur, un instant s'il vous plaît.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: Oui, chambre deux-cent-douze, vue sur jardin.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: Parfait. Est-ce que le petit-déjeuner est inclus?

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: Oui, il est servi de sept heures à dix heures au restaurant.

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: Good morning, I have a reservation under the name Dupont.

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Good morning, sir, one moment please.

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Yes, room two-twelve, garden view.

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: Perfect. Is breakfast included?

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Yes, it is served from seven to ten o'clock in the restaurant.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: Bonjour, j'ai mal à la gorge depuis deux jours.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: Avez-vous de la fièvre également?

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: Non, juste la gorge et un peu de fatigue.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: Je vous conseille ce spray et des pastilles. Si ça ne passe pas, consultez un médecin.

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: Hello, I have had a sore throat for two days.

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Do you also have a fever?

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: No, just the throat and a little fatigue.

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: I recommend this spray and some lozenges. If it doesn't improve, see a doctor.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: いらっしゃいませ。

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: これとこれをください。あと、レジ袋も一枚。

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: 合計で五百二十円になります。

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: 千円でお願いします。

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: 四百八十円のお返しです。ありがとうございました。

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Welcome.

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: I'd like these two items, please. Also, one plastic bag.

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Your total comes to five hundred and twenty yen.

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: Here's one thousand yen.

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Your change is four hundred and eighty yen. Thank you very much.

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: 本日はお時間をいただきありがとうございます。

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: こちらこそ、よろしくお願いします。

transcriptSegments.speaker: OVERLAP
transcriptSegments.text: [Crosstalk] 新しいプロジェクトについて / はい、資料を—

transcriptSegments.speaker: S1
transcriptSegments.text: 失礼しました。先に続けてください。

transcriptSegments.speaker: S2
transcriptSegments.text: 資料をご覧いただけましたか？来月から開始したいと思っています。

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: Thank you very much for your time today.

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Likewise, thank you for having us.

translationSegments.speaker: OVERLAP
translationSegments.textEn: [Crosstalk] About the new project / Yes, the documents—

translationSegments.speaker: S1
translationSegments.textEn: I apologize, please go ahead.

translationSegments.speaker: S2
translationSegments.textEn: Have you had a chance to review the documents? We'd like to start next month.
